title: I Will Always Love You
why_this_song: I Will Always Love You by Dolly Parton (1974) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: That's all I have and all I'm takin' with me

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "always" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "always" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "wish" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "wish" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: That I'm not what you need
Oh, I do wish you joy

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Well I would only be in your way

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "I Will Always Love You" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "I Will Always Love You" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "I Will Always Love You" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "I Will Always Love You"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Dolly Parton one question about "I Will Always Love You", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Dolly Parton sobre "I Will Always Love You", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "I Will Always Love You" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "I Will Always Love You" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?
